mapper.insert: INSERT INTO finnhub_batch_run (job_name, status, message) VALUES (#{jobName}, #{status}, #{message})
mapper.update: UPDATE finnhub_batch_run SET finished_at = #{finishedAt}, status = #{status}, requested_count = #{requestedCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, fail_count = #{failCount}, skipped_count = #{skippedCount}, message = #{message} WHERE id = #{id}
